product_updates.title: Hermes agent maker Nous Research in talks for new funding at $1.5B valuation
product_updates.content: The company is raising at least $75 million, led by Robot Ventures, with significant participation from USV and other prominent investors.

product_updates.title: Satya Nadella has issued a shocking warning to companies using AI
product_updates.content: Of all the debates raging about the potential downsides of AI, there is one worry causing the most hand-wringing among AI enthusiasts in Silicon Valley — that the giant AI labs that sell proprietary models are somehow acting like Trojan horses.

product_updates.title: The wildest allegations in Apple’s trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI
product_updates.content: Apple’s trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI contains allegations that range from employees joking about unauthorized access to Apple’s systems to claims that job candidates were asked to bring Apple hardware to interviews. Here are the complaint’s most eye-catching claims.

product_updates.title: Sam Altman’s space data center trash talk is what most experts already believe
product_updates.content: Responding to Musk accusing him of being a scammer, Altman said, "homeboy you're the one sellling [sic] public market investors on short-term space datacenters."

product_updates.title: Should AI help you get away with killing your spouse?
product_updates.content: What does a world of total user-aligned AI actually look like?

product_updates.title: Anthropic starts localizing Claude pricing for India, its biggest market after the US
product_updates.content: Claude users in India are starting to see Indian rupee-denominated subscription plans.

product_updates.title: Waze adds new AI-powered features and customization updates
product_updates.content: Some of the new features are powered by Google's Gemini AI assistant, which reflects the tech giant's broader push to integrate Gemini across its products while also better positioning Waze to compete with rival services such as Apple Maps.

technical_breakthroughs.title: The US government warns that Russia state hackers are coming after your router
technical_breakthroughs.content: With residential proxies all the rage, CISA urges router users to be vigilant.

technical_breakthroughs.title: Now, defenders are embracing the prompt injection, too
technical_breakthroughs.content: "Context bombing" tricks hacking agents into shutting down before they can do harm.
